programs.program_description: Crypto-focused simulated prop challenge; official materials describe 2-stage evaluation with crypto pairs and strict drawdown rules.

plans.payout_conditions: Profit Split Day can be selected within a 5-60 day window; maximum three payout requests every 30 days per Challenge ID according to terms.
important_notes: Crypto pairs are traded in a simulated account environment according to Bitfunded educational materials.
Rule percentages should be verified on the live challenge checkout page before purchase.

risk_rules.daily_drawdown_based_on: Official educational material describes daily drawdown around 5% from starting equity.
risk_rules.max_drawdown_based_on: Official educational material describes overall drawdown around 8-10% depending on challenge.

funded_stage_and_payouts.payout_processing_time: Bitfunded terms state payouts are processed within a 14-day timeframe and aim for 4-day processing.
funded_stage_and_payouts.profit_split_scaling: Initial 80/20 trader profit split according to Terms of Use.

editorial_summary.main_strength: Crypto-specific prop firm with published payout terms and crypto-focused challenge education.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: Public rules appear partly described in educational posts rather than a single detailed pricing/rules table.
best_for: Crypto traders looking for simulated funded account exposure to major crypto pairs.
not_suitable_for: Traders who require a fully tabulated official pricing and rules page before purchase.
editorial_summary.ideal_trader_profile: Crypto trader comfortable with 24/7 market volatility and strict drawdown limits.

notes_for_human_review: Bitfunded terms are useful for payouts; challenge rules should be verified against the live purchase/pricing page before marking ready.

positive_signals: Help center publishes detailed 1-Step and 2-Step plan rules including drawdown method.

markets_and_platforms.execution_environment: Simulated evaluation leading to funded account agreement after KYC

programs.program_description: BrightFunded offers 2-Step Bright, 2-Step Classic and 1-Step evaluation structures with published drawdown rules in its help center.

plans.drawdown_calculation_notes: Daily drawdown is based on the higher value between equity and balance at the start of the day; equity including floating PnL must not hit the daily breach level.
plans.trailing_drawdown_rules: 1-Step maximum drawdown is trailing/dynamic; 2-Step maximum drawdown is static.
plans.payout_conditions: KYC/ID required after passing evaluation; 15% evaluation profit reward applies under published conditions.
important_notes: BrightFunded 2.0 plan rules apply; original accounts purchased before April 13, 2026 may follow original rules.

plans.drawdown_calculation_notes: Daily drawdown is based on the higher value between equity and balance at the start of the day; equity including floating PnL must not hit the daily breach level.
plans.trailing_drawdown_rules: 1-Step maximum drawdown is trailing/dynamic; 2-Step maximum drawdown is static.
plans.payout_conditions: KYC/ID required after passing evaluation; 15% evaluation profit reward applies under published conditions.
important_notes: BrightFunded 2.0 plan rules apply; original accounts purchased before April 13, 2026 may follow original rules.

plans.drawdown_calculation_notes: Daily drawdown is based on the higher value between equity and balance at the start of the day; equity including floating PnL must not hit the daily breach level.
plans.trailing_drawdown_rules: 1-Step maximum drawdown is trailing/dynamic; 2-Step maximum drawdown is static.
plans.payout_conditions: KYC/ID required after passing evaluation; 15% evaluation profit reward applies under published conditions.
important_notes: BrightFunded 2.0 plan rules apply; original accounts purchased before April 13, 2026 may follow original rules.

risk_rules.daily_drawdown_based_on: Higher value between equity and balance at the start of day; floating PnL counts in equity breach test.
risk_rules.equity_or_balance_rule: Daily drawdown uses higher of equity and balance; account equity must not reach daily loss limit.

funded_stage_and_payouts.first_payout_requirements: After passing evaluation, BrightFunded requires a valid ID document for the funded account agreement; evaluation profit reward applies after reaching 10% growth on funded account and requesting payout.
funded_stage_and_payouts.profit_split_scaling: 15% evaluation profit reward under specified conditions; funded profit split should be verified from current plan/account page.

editorial_summary.main_strength: Detailed help center explains 1-Step, 2-Step Bright, and 2-Step Classic drawdown and target rules.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: BrightFunded is not purely a crypto prop firm; crypto appears as part of multi-market CFD-style offering, so classification should be reviewed.
best_for: Traders wanting clearly documented 1-Step or 2-Step prop evaluation rules.
not_suitable_for: Users looking for a crypto-only prop firm with exchange-native crypto futures rules.
editorial_summary.ideal_trader_profile: Trader comparing 1-Step trailing drawdown versus 2-Step static drawdown challenges.

notes_for_human_review: BrightFunded should likely be shown as CFD Prop Firm with crypto CFDs, not a standalone crypto prop firm, unless a crypto-only official plan is found.
